description: Structured extraction schema for a mortgage statement document.

principal.instruction: Monthly principal portion as a numeric amount only (e.g., 1234). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

interest.instruction: Monthly interest portion as a numeric amount only (e.g., 567). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

escrow.instruction: Monthly escrow portion as a numeric amount only (e.g., 890). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

total.instruction: Total monthly payment amount as a numeric amount only (e.g., 2691). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

borrower_name.instruction: Extract the full legal name of the borrower or mortgagor exactly as shown.

property_address.instruction: Extract the full street address of the mortgaged property, including city, state, and ZIP code if present.

lender_name.instruction: Extract the name of the mortgage lender or loan servicer.

loan_number.instruction: Extract the unique loan or account number exactly as shown, preserving leading zeros.

principal_balance.instruction: Extract the overall remaining principal loan balance as a numeric amount only (e.g., 123456). This is not the monthly payment amount. Do not include currency symbols or commas.

interest_rate.instruction: Extract the annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 6.5 for 6.5%).

escrow_balance.instruction: Extract the current escrow account balance as a numeric amount only (e.g., 123456). Do not include currency symbols or commas.

payment_due_date.instruction: Extract the next payment due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

statement_date.instruction: Extract the statement issue date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

maturity_date.instruction: Extract the loan maturity date in YYYY-MM-DD format if present.
